name: Tony Spell
role: Lead Pastor, Life Tabernacle Church, Central, Louisiana
incident: Tony Spell, lead pastor of Life Tabernacle Church, held in-person church services of over 1,000 people on March 31, 2020 in direct violation of Louisiana Governor John Bel Edwards' emergency stay-at-home order. Spell was charged with six counts of unlawful assembly. Spell argued that the government had no authority over the church, then subsequently requested and accepted a Paycheck Protection Program loan from the federal government whose authority he had publicly rejected.
